title: Create an ad account
content:
Use this endpoint to create an auction ad account in the **Agency** or **Direct** Business Center. You need to be an Admin user of the Business Center. To create auction ad accounts, fill in `AUCTION` in the `type` field under `advertiser_info`. If the ad account is registered in the Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong, France, Brazil or Mexico, you need to use [/bc/image/upload/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739938996913218) to upload images of business licenses or other qualification documents before you can create an ad account in Business Center. If the ad account is registered in the Chinese Mainland, you might need to submit UnionPay verification for your business license. To learn more about UnionPay verification and how to create ad accounts in a Business Center, see [Create an ad account](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1754705407307777#item-link-Create%20an%20ad%20account). > **Important**
> As of September 26, 2024, to ensure ad account security, we have implemented UnionPay verification for the creation of ad accounts in Business Centers via [/bc/advertiser/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939020318721) for advertisers registered in the Chinese mainland. Existing API workflows will continue to function until January 8, 2025. By mid-October 2024, we have released the API changes along with detailed API documentation supporting this change. Affected developers need to implement the new workflow before January 8, 2025, after which integrations might no longer function correctly. > **Note**
  • The endpoint does not support creating multiple ad accounts simultaneously in one Business Center. Please create ad accounts one by one instead.
  • Each user can create a maximum of 10,000 ad accounts across all Business Centers. Additionally, there are daily and total ad account creation quotas for each Business Center, which vary based on the Business Center type. If you reach the quota at the Business Center level or user level, use [/bc/advertiser/disable/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1752349244331009) to disable existing active ad accounts, which will free up the ad account quota.
  • To use this endpoint, you must be in a place where the advertising function is already open. Currently, the function is available in the following countries or regions:
    United Arab Emirates, Austria, Australia, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Switzerland, Chile, Colombia, Czech Republic, Germany, Denmark, Ecuador, Egypt, Spain, Finland, France, United Kingdom, Greece, Hungary, Indonesia, Ireland, Israel, India, Italy, Japan, Cambodia, South Korea, Kuwait, Morocco, Mexico, Malaysia, Netherlands, Norway, New Zealand, Peru, Philippines, Poland, Portugal, Qatar, Romania, Russia, Saudi Arabia, Sweden, Singapore, Thailand, Turkey, Taiwan Province, Ukraine, United States, Vietnam, South Africa.
## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/advertiser/create/| /v1.3/bc/advertiser/create/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`billing_group_id`: number|`bc_id`: string
`billing_group_id`: string | |Request parameter name|`recon_object`| `invoice_group_by`| |New request parameters|/|`qualification_id`
`payment_info`| |Response parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number |`advertiser_id`: string | | New response parameters | / | `payment_portfolio_binding_result`
`budget_setup_result` | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/advertiser/create/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162). | |Content-Type {Required}|string| The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{35%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID.

To obtain the list of Business Centers that you can access, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826). | |tied_to_billing_group|boolean| Whether to add the ad account to a billing group. Default value: `False`.

Note: This field is an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.| |advertiser_info {Required}|object| Ad Account information. | #|name {Required}|string| Ad Account name, length cannot exceed 100 characters. | #|currency {Required}|string| Ad Account currency, note: need to be consistent with the Business Center, the value range is shown in [Appendix-Currency](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737585839634433). | #|timezone {Required}|string| Ad Account time zone code, the value range is shown in [Appendix-Time Zone](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737586324313089).| #|type|string|Type of ad account that you want to create. Enum values: `RESERVATION`, `AUCTION` (default).

Note: `DIRECT` Business Centers can only create an ad account of `AUCTION` type .| |customer_info {Required}|object| Business Information. | #|company {Required}|string| Ad Account company name. Length cannot exceed 255 characters. | #|industry {Required}|number| Ad Account industry ID. The value range is shown in [Appendix-Industries](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739357589575681). | #|registered_area {Required}|string| Ad Account registration code. The value range is shown in [Appendix-Location code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737585867307010).| |qualification_info {+Conditional}|object| Required when your Business Center type is `AGENCY` or `SELF_SERVICE_AGENCY`.

Qualification information.

Note: Don't specify this object when your Business Center type is `DIRECT`, or an error will occur. | #|promotion_link {+Conditional}|string|Required when your Business Center type is `AGENCY` or `SELF_SERVICE_AGENCY`.

Promotion link. The value must be the company's website URL.

Length limit: 255 characters. | #|license_no {+Conditional} |string| Required for ad accounts that are registered in the Chinese mainland, Hong Kong, or in countries Brazil and Mexico.

Business license number.

Note: If the ad account is registered in the Chinese Mainland, you might need to submit UnionPay verification for your business license. To check the UnionPay verification requirement for your business license, use [/bc/advertiser/unionpay_info/check/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1813772238056449). To learn more about UnionPay verification and how to create ad accounts in a Business Center, see [Create an ad account](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1754705407307777#item-link-Create%20an%20ad%20account). | #|license_image_id {+Conditional} |string| Required for ad accounts that are registered in the Chinese mainland or Hong Kong.

Qualified Document picture ID, see [Upload a business certificate](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739938996913218). | #|qualification_image_ids {+Conditional} |string[]| Required if the ad account or the Business Center is registered in France, Brazil, or Mexico.

Other Qualified Documents picture ID. See [Upload a business certificate](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739938996913218). | #|qualification_id|string|Qualification id. You can use this field to reuse the qualification information of other ad accounts. You can get the ID via the response of [/bc/advertiser/qualification/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1770118680584194) endpoint.

Note: If you pass in this field, you can not pass in other parameters under `qualification_info`.| |contact_info |object| Contact Information. | #|name |string| Contact name. No more than 100 characters in length. | #|email{+Conditional} |string | Contact email. Required if the place of registration of the ad account or the Business Center is France, Brazil, or Mexico. | #|number |string| Contact phone. | |billing_info {+Conditional} |object| Billing information. Required if the place of registration of the ad account or the agency that owns the Business Center is France, Brazil, or Mexico.
Code example for Mexican ad account creation: `"billing_info":{"address":"xxxx","tax_field_dict": {"tax_id": "xxxx", "tax_regime": "xxxx"}}`| #|address |string| Billing address, no more than 512 characters in length. | #|tax_field_dict |dict| Billing and invoicing tax number. Different countries use different tax number fields.

  • The tax number field `vat` is used for European countries, for instance, France.
  • The tax number field `tax_id` is used for Brazil (required), Mexico (required), United Arab Emirates, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Israel, Turkey, Canada, and the United States.
  • The tax number field `abn` is used for Australia and New Zealand.
| |billing_group_info|object| Billing group information.| #|invoice_group_by {Required}|string|Invoicing mode. Enum values:
  • `ACCOUNT`: Invoices in this billing groups are combined.
  • `ADVERTISER`: Invoices in this billing group are handled separately.
| #|billing_group_id|string|Billing group ID. Valid when `invoice_group_by` is `ACCOUNT`.| #|invoice_payer {+Conditional}|string|Party who pays the invoices. Enum values: `AGENCY`, `ADVERTISER`. This field is required when the registered area of the ad account is `FR` (France). | | payment_info | object | Payment information. | #| payment_portfolio_id | string | Valid when you have enabled the multiple Payment Portfolios feature.

The ID of the Payment Portfolio to which the ad account will be linked.

If the linkage to the Payment Portfolio fails, the ad account creation will still succeed.
To confirm the result of the linkage, check the response parameter `payment_portfolio_binding_result`.

Note:

  • Multiple Payment Portfolios for one client is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.
| #| budget_info | object | Details of the budget settings for the ad account.

If budget settings fail, the ad account creation will still succeed.
To confirm the final budget settings, check the response parameter `budget_setup_result`. | ##| budget_mode | string | Budget mode of the ad account.

Enum values:
  • `UNLIMITED`: Unlimited budget. No budget limit for the ad account.
  • `MONTHLY_BUDGET`: Monthly budget. The ad account consumes BC credit balance within the monthly budget.
  • `DAILY_BUDGET`: Daily budget. The ad account consumes BC credit balance within the daily budget.
  • `CUSTOM_BUDGET`: Custom budget. The ad account consumes BC credit balance within the one-time custom budget.
Default value : `MONTHLY_BUDGET`. | ##| budget {+Conditional} | number | Required when `budget_mode` is `MONTHLY_BUDGET`, `DAILY_BUDGET`, or `CUSTOM_BUDGET`.

The ad account budget, kept to two decimal places.
  • If `budget_mode` is set to `MONTHLY_BUDGET`, specify a monthly budget.
  • If `budget_mode` is set to `DAILY_BUDGET`, specify a daily budget.
  • If `budget_mode` is set to `CUSTOM_BUDGET`, specify your one-time custom budget.
| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "bc_id": "BC_ID", "advertiser_info": {"currency": "CURRENCY", "name": "NAME", "timezone": "TIMEZONE"}, "billing_info": {"address": "ADDRESS", "vat": "VAT"}, "contact_info": {"email": "EMAIL", "name": "NAME", "number": "NUMBER"}, "customer_info": {"company": "COMPANY", "industry": "INDUSTRY", "registered_area": "REGISTERED_AREA"}, "qualification_info": {"license_image_id": "LICENSE_IMAGE_ID", "license_no": "LICENSE_NO", "promotion_link": "PROMOTION_LINK", "qualification_image_ids": ["QUALIFICATION_IMAGE_IDS"]} }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/advertiser/create/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{35%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code, see [Appendix-Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Return message, see [Appendix-Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | |data |object|Return data.| #|advertiser_id |string| Ad Account ID | #| payment_portfolio_binding_result | object | The result of binding the newly created ad account to the Payment Portfolio (`payment_portfolio_id`) specified in the request. | ##| status | string | Binding status.

Enum values:
  • `SUCCESS`: The ad account was successfully bound to the Payment Portfolio.
  • `FAILED`: The ad account failed to be bound to the Payment Portfolio.
| ##| error_msg | string | The error message.

When `status` is `SUCCESS`, the value of this field will be null. | #| budget_setup_result | object | The result of setting the budget for the newly created ad account. | ##| status | string | Budget setup status.

Enum values:
  • `SUCCESS`: The budget settings were successfully configured for the ad account.
  • `FAILED`: The budget settings failed to be configured for the ad account.
| ##| error_msg | string | The error message.

When `status` is `SUCCESS`, the value of this field will be null. | ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code); ```
